opportunities.title: Third Call for Proposals
opportunities.vessel_procurement_angle: Under Priority 2 (Green), the call targets sustainable transport solutions including inland waterway transport. Electric vessels and hybrid propulsion systems would fit as project equipment for demonstrating green transport technologies, modal shift initiatives, or fleet decarbonisation projects on the Danube corridor.
opportunities.target_customer_segment: Municipalities operating public ferry services, environmental NGOs working on Danube projects, port operators seeking green transport solutions, research institutions studying sustainable inland waterway transport
opportunities.sales_pitch_angle: This EU grant could fund up to several hundred thousand euros for your green transport project on the Danube - electric vessels would be eligible as demonstration equipment for sustainable inland waterway initiatives.
opportunities.relevance_reason: Strong fit given Danube focus and Priority 2 green transport objectives, though vessel procurement angle requires positioning within broader sustainable transport projects

opportunities.title: EUR 223.2 m for cross-sectoral solutions for the climate transition, sustainable, secure and competitive energy supply and efficient, sustainable and inclusive energy use
opportunities.programme: Horizon Europe – the Framework Programme for Research and Innovation
opportunities.vessel_procurement_angle: Strong potential fit for electric and hybrid marine propulsion development and demonstration. This climate transition and sustainable energy call could fund vessel electrification projects, hybrid propulsion system development, or demonstration of zero-emission waterway transport solutions as part of broader energy transition initiatives.
opportunities.target_customer_segment: Transport companies planning fleet electrification, port operators implementing green energy solutions, municipalities with public waterway transport, research institutions studying sustainable maritime transport
opportunities.sales_pitch_angle: This major Horizon Europe call could fund your vessel electrification or hybrid propulsion demonstration project as part of the EU's climate transition goals - we can provide the electric engines and technical expertise for your proposal.
opportunities.relevance_reason: Large budget call explicitly focused on sustainable energy and climate transition, excellent fit for electric marine propulsion projects with clear commercial potential

opportunities.title: LIFE Clean Energy Transition
opportunities.vessel_procurement_angle: Electric marine engines and hybrid propulsion systems qualify as clean energy transition technology. Vessels can demonstrate sustainable energy solutions in maritime transport, including shore power connections and electrification projects.
opportunities.target_customer_segment: Port operators implementing electrification, municipalities with public ferry services, logistics companies near waterways seeking clean energy solutions, marina operators upgrading to sustainable technology
opportunities.sales_pitch_angle: Frame electric engines and hybrid systems as clean energy transition investments eligible for EU funding, helping prospects modernize operations while accessing significant grant support.
opportunities.relevance_reason: Clean energy transition directly supports electric and hybrid marine propulsion technology, with strong match to dealer's product portfolio and customer segments

opportunities.title: LIFE Climate Change Mitigation and Adaptation
opportunities.vessel_procurement_angle: Electric or hybrid vessels can be procured as demonstration projects for GHG reduction on inland waterways, particularly Danube operations. Vessels serve as climate mitigation technology showcasing zero-emission or low-emission transport alternatives.
opportunities.target_customer_segment: Environmental NGOs active on Danube, municipalities with waterway operations, river transport companies seeking to demonstrate clean technology, port operators implementing green solutions
opportunities.sales_pitch_angle: Position electric engines and hybrid vessels as eligible climate demonstration technology that can secure EU funding while reducing operational emissions and showcasing environmental leadership.
opportunities.relevance_reason: Climate action focus aligns with electric/hybrid vessel technology, and eligible beneficiaries match dealer's customer base, though vessel procurement is indirect through demonstration projects

opportunities.title: LIFE close-to-market support
opportunities.vessel_procurement_angle: SMEs developing cleantech solutions can procure electric vessels or engines as part of bringing maritime clean technology to market. Support covers development and market introduction of sustainable marine solutions.
opportunities.target_customer_segment: Marine technology SMEs, cleantech start-ups in maritime sector, innovative companies developing sustainable vessel solutions, electric propulsion developers
opportunities.sales_pitch_angle: Target innovative marine companies that can use LIFE funding to procure electric vessels or engines as part of their cleantech development and market entry strategy.
opportunities.relevance_reason: Supports cleantech market development which could include vessel procurement, though more focused on technology developers than end-users of dealer's products

opportunities.title: Call for proposals "Support to awareness raising about the Arctic communities, including Indigenous People"
opportunities.programme: European Maritime, Fisheries and Aquaculture Fund (EMFAF)
eligible_beneficiaries: Organizations working on Arctic maritime issues
opportunities.vessel_procurement_angle: Limited relevance. While this is an EMFAF maritime fund call, it focuses specifically on awareness raising about Arctic communities rather than vessel procurement or maritime equipment. Any vessel purchase would need to be justified as equipment for awareness/education activities in Arctic maritime contexts.
opportunities.target_customer_segment: NGOs or educational organizations with Arctic maritime programs, potentially needing boats for research or community engagement activities
opportunities.sales_pitch_angle: If you're planning Arctic maritime awareness or research activities, this EMFAF grant could fund the vessel component of your project as essential equipment for community engagement or research operations.
opportunities.relevance_reason: EMFAF maritime funding but focused on awareness rather than direct vessel procurement, limited applicability to Romanian Danube operations
